title: Now Time
description: Schedule real-time/in-game-time broadcasts in server chat!
body:
### Now Time Mod

**🔥 Do you often forget real time because you are immersed in games? This mod will periodically report the time.**


A **lightweight server-side mod** that **automatically broadcasts real-world time** in chat at customizable intervals – your perfect reality anchor.  

✨ **Key Features:**  
*   **⏱️ Ultimate Customization**: Set intervals, frequency, and **fully customize chat message formats**! (Using cron expression) 
*   **🎮 Also In-game-time**: Displays **in-game time** – perfect for survival planning!  
*   **⚡ Feather-Light**: Near-zero performance impact. Runs silently in the background.  
*   **🔧 Server-Side Only**: Only require server-side, **all players get alerts instantly** – no client mods!  

---

### 准点报时模组

🔥你是否时常因为沉浸游戏而忘记了现实时间？？**NowTime** 来帮你！  

这是一款**轻量级服务端模组**，能在 Minecraft 服务器的聊天区中**定时自动播报现实时间**。  

✨ **核心功能：**  
*   **⏱️ 自由定制**：随心设置报时间隔、频率，甚至个性化聊天信息格式！（使用cron表达式） 
*   **🎮 游戏时间**：除现实时间外，**额外支持播报游戏内时间**！  
*   **⚡ 轻若无物**：性能开销很少，服务器运行流畅无卡顿。  
*   **🔧 仅服务端**：无需客户端安装，全服玩家即刻体验！
